item.title: Novo Nordisk’s New Weight‑Loss Drug Just Failed a Big Trial—So Why Is It Still Headed to Market?
item.description: The Danish drugmaker’s latest trial setback intensifies its high-stakes rivalry with Eli Lilly in the booming obesity market.

item.title: OpenAI Just Launched a Major Alliance With McKinsey and Other Consulting Giants
item.description: OpenAI is spinning up an ambitious go-to-market strategy for its new AI co-worker platform.

item.title: The Creator of the Best iPhone Camera App Says Your ‘Perfect’ Photos Are Boring
item.description: Ben Sandofsky, the developer behind Halide, explains why bypassing all that computational photography might lead to better photos overall.

item.title: Wendy’s Is Closing Hundreds of Restaurants. Here Are 5 Leadership Realities Behind That Decision
item.description: The fast food mainstay expects “flat” global systemwide sales in 2026. Translation: no growth.

item.title: This CEO Just Rebranded His B2B Company. It’s a Lesson in Manifesting
item.description: With a new name, Everpure is stepping into its next era with expanded offerings.
